title: vitis riparia
intro: Vitis riparia, also known as riverbank grape or frost grape, is a wild grapevine species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Vitis riparia is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is also used in herbal supplements and topical creams for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
